verses.text: Israel sins; the Philistines oppress them forty years. Philistines. A long bondage.
The angel tells barren Manoah's wife she shall bear a son. A son. God gives life to the barren.
The angel tells barren Manoah's wife she shall bear a son. A son. God gives life to the barren.
The child shall be a Nazarite, to begin to deliver Israel. Nazarite. Set apart from the womb.
The child shall be a Nazarite, to begin to deliver Israel. Nazarite. Set apart from the womb.
She tells Manoah of the man of God. Reported. She marks his awe.
She tells Manoah of the man of God. Reported. She marks his awe.
Manoah prays, and the angel comes again. Prayer. He seeks more guidance.
Manoah prays, and the angel comes again. Prayer. He seeks more guidance.
Manoah prays, and the angel comes again. Prayer. He seeks more guidance.
The angel repeats the charge concerning the child. Repeated. God confirms His word.
The angel repeats the charge concerning the child. Repeated. God confirms His word.
The angel repeats the charge concerning the child. Repeated. God confirms His word.
The angel repeats the charge concerning the child. Repeated. God confirms His word.
Manoah would honour him; his name is 'secret.' Wonderful. The angel's name is past knowing.
Manoah would honour him; his name is 'secret.' Wonderful. The angel's name is past knowing.
Manoah would honour him; his name is 'secret.' Wonderful. The angel's name is past knowing.
Manoah would honour him; his name is 'secret.' Wonderful. The angel's name is past knowing.
The angel ascends in the altar flame. Ascended. God reveals His glory.
The angel ascends in the altar flame. Ascended. God reveals His glory.
Manoah fears death; his wife reasons wisely. Reassured. God's gift means no harm.
Manoah fears death; his wife reasons wisely. Reassured. God's gift means no harm.
Manoah fears death; his wife reasons wisely. Reassured. God's gift means no harm.
Samson is born; the Spirit begins to move him. Samson. God prepares His deliverer.
Samson is born; the Spirit begins to move him. Samson. God prepares His deliverer.
